stories.title: Barnwell makes sense of the Myles Garrett blockbus...
stories.summary: Does Myles Garrett really put the Rams over the top? Will the Browns regret the move? And how does Jared Verse fit in? Let's size up this massive trade.

stories.title: Garrett is off to the Rams: How did it come to thi...
stories.summary: How all-in are the Rams? What changed for Cleveland? Answering seven questions and grading the trade.

stories.title: Eagles trade star WR Brown to Pats for two picks
stories.summary: The Eagles are trading star wide receiver A.J. Brown to the Patriots for a first-round draft pick in 2028 and a 2027 fifth-round pick.

stories.title: Sources: Garrett traded to Rams in blockbuster
stories.summary: The Browns have traded Myles Garrett to the Rams for Jared Verse and multiple draft picks, including a 2027 first-rounder.

stories.title: Hall of Fame basketball coach Adelman dies at 79
stories.summary: Hall of Fame basketball coach Rick Adelman, who won more than 1,000 games over the course of a nearly 30-year career in the NBA, has died. He was 79.
